title: Super Mario Kart
edition_pinned: Row describes the 1992 SNES design; genre evidence from archived Wii U Virtual Console product page, observed 2026-07-13.
moat: Item roulette and drift boosts convert track knowledge into contested race swings.
scope_efficiency_hypothesis: One kart physics kit plus shared items support solo ghost races and multiplayer cups.
exemplar_rationale: Defines item-combat kart racing with fixed vehicles and short round structure.

evidence.claim: Archived Nintendo Wii U Virtual Console product page listed Genre as: Racing.
evidence.platform: Nintendo Store (archived Wii U Virtual Console)
